tasks.title: Define CodeIntelligenceProvider interface
tasks.notes: Created src/tools/code-intelligence.ts with interface, PROVIDERS map, getProvider(). tsc --noEmit passes.

tasks.title: Implement gitnexus provider
tasks.notes: Created src/tools/code-intelligence-gitnexus.ts. GitNexusProvider uses StdioClientTransport singleton to npx gitnexus mcp. Each method delegates to call_graph/impact/query/context. Registered in PROVIDERS map.

tasks.title: Register 4 MCP tools in server
tasks.notes: Registered code_graph, code_impact, code_query, code_context in src/index.ts. Each calls getProvider() and delegates.

tasks.title: Write unit tests for code intelligence abstraction
tasks.notes: 7 tests in tests/code-intelligence.test.ts. All pass. MCP client mocked -- no live gitnexus needed.

tasks.title: Add repo parameter to all 4 fleet tool schemas
Verify Phase 1
tasks.notes: APPROVED by ApraFleetRev after one CHANGES NEEDED cycle. Schema fixes for code_impact and code_context, AGENTS.md cleanup, llms-full.txt restored. Build clean, 7/7 new tests pass.

tasks.title: Update install.ts Step 9
tasks.notes: Removed gitnexus .mcp.json write block. Added cleanup to remove mcpServers.gitnexus if present. Writes ~/.apra-fleet/data/code-intelligence/config.json with provider=gitnexus.

tasks.title: Update tpl-doer + tpl-reviewer
tasks.notes: KB sections in tpl-doer.md and tpl-reviewer.md use fleet code intelligence tools only. No gitnexus-by-name references. Em dashes fixed to ASCII.

tasks.title: Update knowledge-agent.md
tasks.notes: skills/fleet/knowledge-agent.md created with KB Prime/Capture/Harvest workflow using fleet tool names only. 1751 bytes, no gitnexus-specific names.

tasks.title: Write code intelligence routing instruction to ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md on install
tasks.notes: Added try/catch block in install.ts Step 9 after config.json write. Appends sentinel-guarded block to ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md instructing use of code_graph/code_impact/code_query/code_context tools. Idempotent via sentinel check. Build clean, 2 pre-existing time-utils failures only.

tasks.title: Verify Phase 2 (first pass -- approved before T2.4)
tasks.notes: APPROVED by ApraFleetRev. All T2 items verified: Step 9 present, templates clean, knowledge-agent.md committed. Build clean, same 3 pre-existing test failures as Phase 1.
